name: 16" Pattern Woven Decorative Basket with Curved Handle Black/Natural - Threshold™
description:
A perfect blend of style and functionality, this Pattern Woven Decorative Basket with Curved Handle from Threshold™ is an elegant addition to your space. This round basket is woven from seagrass in black and natural hues to add a rustic touch to any space. Designed in a round shape, it features two curved handles on the sides for easy portability.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
